name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Winter Garden, FL's Value Pawn & Jewelry at 13987 W Colonial Dr offers pawn loans, jewelry sales, and gold buying.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates at 13987 W Colonial Dr in Winter Garden, FL as a standalone pawn shop serving the local community. The location is conveniently situated for West Orange County residents needing quick access to pawn services. Hours are Monday through Friday 9AM–7PM, Saturday 9AM–6PM, and closed Sunday.

This Winter Garden location buys and sells jewelry, gold, and other valuable items, while also offering short-term pawn loans at fair rates. You can reach the shop directly at 407-656-3388 to ask about current pricing, check if specific items are in stock, or get pre-approval for a loan before visiting.

If you live or work in Winter Garden and need emergency cash or want to sell jewelry and gold items, this location is your neighborhood pawn shop. Bring a valid photo ID and the items you wish to pawn or sell. Value Pawn & Jewelry handles all transactions with transparency and speed.
address: 13987 W Colonial Dr, Winter Garden, FL 34787

company_info.headquarters: 13987 W Colonial Dr, Winter Garden, FL 34787

pros: Offers same-day cash loans based on item collateral with no credit check required
Expert gold and diamond testing ensures customers receive fair market pricing on precious metals
Extensive inventory of pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, and merchandise at 25-70% discounts
Online Instant Quote tool provides estimated values for electronics remotely before visiting the store
Multiple flexible payment options including layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and third-party financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards program awards points on pawns, redeems, sales, and purchases for repeat customer loyalty
Specialized services including firearms sales, auto loans, and jewelry protection plans
Daily inventory updates with online shop access for convenient browsing from home
cons: Pawn loans require physical collateral and are subject to undisclosed fees and terms requiring in-person consultation
Service availability is geographically limited and varies by location (e.g., online payments unavailable in AZ, OR, PA)
All merchandise is pre-owned with no warranty guarantees; product protection plans require additional paid enrollment
Jewelry VIP Program and protection plans involve ongoing costs that are not detailed on the website
No transparent interest rates or APR information disclosed for pawn loans or third-party financing options
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) who own items of collateral value and lack access to traditional credit
Budget shoppers seeking heavily discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, and brand-name merchandise
Repeat customers interested in loyalty rewards through the EZ+ program and layaway payment flexibility
Sellers of gold, diamonds, or other precious metals seeking expert appraisal and fair market-value payouts
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers with items of collateral value who need immediate cash and cannot access traditional credit, as well as budget-conscious shoppers seeking heavily discounted pre-owned goods. The critical caveat is that pawn loans involve undisclosed fees and require physical collateral, making them a short-term solution only; customers should carefully understand all terms before pledging items, and the lack of transparent APR information makes cost comparison difficult.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based short-term lending with fees and terms)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert precious metals testing
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, tools, gaming equipment, jewelry, and fashion items
Online shop with daily inventory updates and new arrival browsing
Instant Quote tool for remote electronics valuations
Layaway payment plans (10% down, monthly payments until paid in full)
Third-party flexible financing options (up to 12 months, subject to credit eligibility)
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up value on future purchases
Product Protection Plan for electronics and merchandise coverage
EZ+ Rewards Program for points accumulation on eligible transactions
